comics.chapters.empty: No chapters yet — create the first one below.
comics.create.intro: Publish sequential art — western comics, manga, or vertical-scroll webtoons. You can link it to your stories and encyclopedia later.
comics.create.title: New comic
comics.danger.delete.aria: Confirmation modal for deleting a comic
comics.danger.delete.desc: Permanently deletes this comic, including all chapters, pages, and layers. This cannot be undone.
comics.danger.delete.title: Delete comic
comics.danger.delete.warning: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
comics.danger.makePrivate.aria: Confirmation modal for making a comic private
comics.danger.makePrivate.desc: Making this comic private removes it from discovery and search. People who bought it or saved it keep access.
comics.danger.makePrivate.title: Make comic private
comics.danger.makePrivate.warning: This comic will be hidden from discovery and search. Existing buyers keep access.
comics.danger.makePublic.aria: Confirmation modal for making a comic public
comics.danger.makePublic.desc: This comic is currently private. Making it public lists it in discovery again.
comics.danger.makePublic.title: Make comic public
comics.danger.makePublic.warning: This comic will be discoverable again and available for new readers to buy.
comics.freePreviewHelp: Number of opening chapters readable for free.
comics.gate.explain: Support the creators of “{title}” — your purchase unlocks instant reading.
comics.gate.title: This chapter is part of the paid comic
comics.layers.empty: A page with only its base art is fully valid — add SFX, text, or encyclopedia hotspots when you need them.
comics.layers.needsUniverse: Encyclopedia hotspots need the comic to belong to a universe.
comics.pricing.chapterHelp: Readers can buy a single chapter. Can be sold alongside the whole comic and volumes.
comics.reader.endBody: That's all for now — thanks for reading!
comics.reader.emptyChapter: This chapter has no pages yet.
comics.split.author: Author
comics.volumesHelp: Sell chapter ranges as volumes. Chapter numbers are inclusive and ranges must not overlap.
